args: FoldBench-100 vs afdb-24M full train reps (1.33M)
caption: Per-candidate TM-align search time vs length, against a 229-rep target DB. At this tiny DB size the cost is dominated by Foldseek per-call setup, not DB scaling — absolute numbers will rise with the full ~1.3M-rep training DB. Batched throughput is in the '__ALL__' row.
